name: axiom/capabilities
title: Capabilities Section
description: A capabilities section block with editable cards, metrics, and intro text.

intro.default: Axiom Drive operates three dedicated manufacturing facilities spanning 180,000 m², equipped with closed-loop forging presses, 5-axis CNC machining centers, and fully automated assembly lines. Every unit exits through our multi-stage zero-defect protocol before shipment.

default.title: Precision Forging
default.text: Closed-die hot forging with automated flash trimming. Bearing-grade steel blanks with controlled metallurgical properties.

default.title: CNC Machining
default.text: 48 machining centers operating 24/7. Sub-micron tolerances on bearing surfaces. Hard turning and grinding for final geometry.

default.title: Heat Treatment
default.text: Controlled atmosphere carburizing and induction hardening. Optimised case depth profiles for fatigue resistance and load rating.

default.title: Assembly & Testing
default.text: Automated assembly cells with 100% torque verification, ABS encoder ring integration, and end-of-line noise testing.
